summary: Iteration 21 testing completed: All 16 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features tested: auth login for super admin/test employee/test admin, applications visibility restrictions (admin sees all, employee sees own), training applications visibility, application-settings API, batch delete, period settings dialog, status banners.

applications_visibility.direct_access_blocked: PASS - Employee cannot access other user's application by ID (403)

application_settings.update_admin_only: PASS - Employee gets 403, admin can update

training_applications_page_ui.status_banner: PASS - Shows 'Training applications are open — Deadline: 12/31/2026'
training_applications_page_ui.new_application_button: PASS - Enabled when period is open
training_applications_page_ui.settings_dialog: PASS - Contains bursary/training toggles, deadlines, close days

bursary_applications_page_ui.status_banner: PASS - Shows 'Bursary applications are open — Deadline: 12/31/2026'

user_profile_page.bursary_edit_buttons: PASS - Multiple bursary apps with Edit buttons
user_profile_page.training_edit_buttons: PASS - Training apps with Edit button navigates to /training-applications/{id}/edit

employee_visibility_restrictions_ui.new_application_visible: PASS - Employee can still create apps

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails

seed_data_creation: Test applications created and deleted during tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 21 features verified working: 1) Auth login for super admin/test employee/test admin all working, 2) Applications visibility - admin sees all, employee sees only own and cannot access others by ID (403), 3) Training applications same visibility rules, 4) Application-settings endpoint returns bursary_open/training_open fields and supports deadlines, 5) PUT application-settings admin only, 6) DELETE and batch-delete for both bursary and training apps admin only, 7) TrainingApplicationsPage has Period Settings button, status banner, batch selection, admin edit/delete, 8) Bursary ApplicationsPage same features, 9) UserProfilePage My Applications tab shows edit buttons that navigate to /training-applications/{id}/edit, 10) Employee UI correctly hides admin-only features.
